response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development and leadership, with a strong background in open-source technologies and various programming languages. His experience in IT architecture, technical project management, and team leadership aligns with the job requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development and leadership
Proven track record in IT architecture and technical project management
concerns: Limited experience in UML and architecture design
German language proficiency is basic, not meeting the C1 requirement
No direct experience in project management
